description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and a predominantly white exterior accented by black and blue details. The car features a sculpted hood, aggressive front air intakes, and streamlined side mirrors with blue highlights. Its roof and rear section are finished in black, with blue accents on the rear spoiler and side skirts, enhancing its sporty appearance. The windows are tinted, and the car sits on black, multi-spoke alloy wheels that add to its dynamic look. The rear of the car is equipped with a prominent diffuser and dual exhausts, emphasizing its racing pedigree. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, agility, and modern aesthetics, suitable for urban environments or high-end neighborhoods.
description: A low, white sports car with black and blue accents, aggressive styling, and black multi-spoke wheels. Features include a sculpted body, tinted windows, and a rear spoiler.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the sculpted hood, blue-accented side mirrors, and aggressive front air intakes.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the black roof, blue rear spoiler, and dual exhausts.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the rear diffuser, taillights, and blue accents on the spoiler and side skirts.
description_view_3: Front side view emphasizing the aerodynamic lines, tinted windows, and blue-accented mirrors.
